definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is a very independent person.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He is a very independent person.
definitions.usage_context_en: Not depending on another for help or money.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Not depending on another for help or money.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Thank you, that is very generous.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Thank you, that is very generous.
definitions.usage_context_en: Willing to give more money, help, or time than is usual or expected.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Willing to give more money, help, or time than is usual or expected.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Don't be selfish, share your toys.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Don't be selfish, share your toys.
definitions.usage_context_en: Lacking consideration for others; concerned chiefly with one's own profit or pleasure.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Lacking consideration for others; concerned chiefly with one's own profit or pleasure.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is very sensitive to criticism.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He is very sensitive to criticism.
definitions.usage_context_en: Quick to detect or respond to slight changes; easily hurt or offended.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Quick to detect or respond to slight changes; easily hurt or offended.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: That is a sensible decision.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Having or showing common sense and good judgment; practical.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Having or showing common sense and good judgment; practical.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: That was a thoughtful gift.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Showing consideration for the needs of other people.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Showing consideration for the needs of other people.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A good leader must be flexible.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: A good leader must be flexible.
definitions.usage_context_en: Ready and able to change so as to adapt to different circumstances.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Ready and able to change so as to adapt to different circumstances.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She is very tolerant of other opinions.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: She is very tolerant of other opinions.
definitions.usage_context_en: Showing willingness to allow the existence of opinions different from one's own.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Showing willingness to allow the existence of opinions different from one's own.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is too stubborn to apologize.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He is too stubborn to apologize.
definitions.usage_context_en: Having or showing dogged determination not to change one's attitude.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Having or showing dogged determination not to change one's attitude.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She always has an optimistic attitude.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: She always has an optimistic attitude.
definitions.usage_context_en: Hopeful and confident about the future.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Hopeful and confident about the future.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He tends to be pessimistic about the future.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He tends to be pessimistic about the future.
definitions.usage_context_en: Tending to see the worst aspect of things.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Tending to see the worst aspect of things.]
